manifest.lab: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Rollback & Challenge Window Lab
manifest.publicSitePosture: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.
manifest.claimBoundary: Browser-local synthetic demonstration. No certification claim, no external audit claim, no value movement, no active settlement, no custody, no staking, no autonomous production authority.

mission.objective: Demonstrate why release authority requires proof, challenge clearance, canary monitoring, and rollback readiness.
mission.doctrine: No proof, no propagation. No rollback, no release.
mission.userOutcome: Understand how GoalOS prevents persuasive but unsafe AI output from becoming institutional default.

candidates.name: Persuasive release note
candidates.reason: No rollback target. No replay path. No release authority.

candidates.name: Proof packet with contradiction
candidates.reason: Challenge window found unsupported claim boundary drift.

candidates.name: Canary release candidate
candidates.reason: Canary monitor found delayed-risk signal. Release held.

candidates.name: Rollbackable proof-carrying artifact
candidates.reason: Proof, replay, rollback, canary, challenge, scope, and human gate clear.

rollbackReceipt.rollbackReason: challenge-window contradiction and boundary drift in candidate C1

failureMemoryEntry.chronicleRule: Rejected or rolled-back traces remain as warnings, not reusable authority.
failureMemoryEntry.reusableWarning: High score without rollback is not release-grade work.
failureMemoryEntry.nextMissionEffect: future routing penalizes proof debt and missing rollback plans
